\tzpentry{ID3950}{Staging Exports Extraction Curated Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3950 introduces Staging Exports Extraction Curated Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n u_{i,k} := \\frac{X \\cdot 2^{32} + \\left(\\kappa(i,k) \\bmod 2^{32} \\right) + 0.5}{10^L \\cdot 2^{32} + 1}\n \\]
